[Question]
What could be the possible causes of toothache?

artner
A toothache can be caused by several factors. Here are some common possibilities:

1. Tooth decay (cavities)
2. Gum disease
3. Tooth fracture or crack
4. Infection or abscess in the tooth or gum
5. Tooth sensitivity
6. Bruxism (teeth grinding)
7. Sinus issues (referred pain)

These are some of the most common causes of toothache.
